### Pre-employment testing laws & regulations

Like all other legalities involved in hiring process, candidate evaluation is subject to a series of pre-employment testing laws. To avoid pre-employment testing legal issues, EEOC laws & guidelines should be considered before implementing pre-employment tests at your company. EEOC pre-employment testing ensures that the evaluation tests fit for the position and purpose for which they are being used.
